Widgets API

The Widgets API allows you to create and manage widgets.

Authentication

The Widgets API uses Bearer token authentication. Include your API token in the Authorization header.

curl https://api.example.com/v1/widgets \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"

POST /v1/widgets

Creates a new widget. Returns the created widget object.

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
colorstringrequiredThe color of the widget
sizeintegerfalseWidget size in mm
 
curl -X POST https://api.example.com/v1/widgets \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"color": "red", "size": 12}'
{
  "id": "wgt_abc123",
  "color": "red",
  "size": 12
}

GET /v1/widgets/{id}

Retrieves a widget by its unique identifier.

ParameterTypeRequiredDescription
idstringrequiredThe widget identifier
 
curl https://api.example.com/v1/widgets/wgt_abc123 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
{
  "id": "wgt_abc123",
  "color": "red",
  "size": 12
}

DELETE /v1/widgets/{id}

Deletes a widget by id. Returns 204 on success.

curl -X DELETE https://api.example.com/v1/widgets/wgt_abc123 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
